Kadir Has University

Public Relations and Publicity

Kadir Has University Department of Public Relations and Publicity aims to train communication professionals who can think creatively and analytically. With project-based education, students gain practical experience in the sector and specialise in areas such as public relations, social responsibility projects and digital content production.
